  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/tkrat2          Makefile 
  Log:
  - Respect X11BASE

    it sets correct path to xlib.

  Submitted by:   rafan
  Approved by:    Stephen J. Roznowski <sjr@comcast.net> (maintainer)
